prompts.name: Foggy Street
prompts.text: Create a foggy street atmosphere with limited visibility, muted light, and quiet suspense without excessive gore.

prompts.name: Abandoned House
prompts.text: Place the scene in an abandoned house with peeling walls, broken furniture, dust, and atmospheric tension.

prompts.name: Old Mansion
prompts.text: Create an old mansion setting with dark wood, antique decor, long corridors, and restrained gothic mood.

prompts.name: Candlelit Corridor
prompts.text: Use a candlelit corridor with long shadows, warm flicker, and a sense of hidden story.

prompts.name: Shadow Figure
prompts.text: Add a vague shadowy figure in the distance, keeping it subtle, atmospheric, and non-graphic.

prompts.name: Rainy Window
prompts.text: Use a rainy window with streaking droplets, dim interior light, and reflective melancholy.

prompts.name: Dusty Attic
prompts.text: Place the scene in a dusty attic with old trunks, soft beams of light, and forgotten objects.

prompts.name: Library at Night
prompts.text: Create a nighttime library with dim lamps, towering shelves, and quiet investigative mood.

prompts.name: Clock Room
prompts.text: Place the scene in a room filled with old clocks, brass details, ticking atmosphere, and surreal mystery.

prompts.name: Antique Mirror
prompts.text: Add an antique mirror with aged glass, ornate frame, and unsettling reflective atmosphere.

prompts.name: Forest at Night
prompts.text: Set the scene in a nighttime forest with moonlight, mist, silhouettes, and restrained suspense.

prompts.name: Empty Station
prompts.text: Place the scene in an empty train station at night with fluorescent light, long platforms, and lonely atmosphere.

prompts.name: Hidden Door
prompts.text: Add a hidden door or secret passage with subtle clues, aged materials, and discovery-focused composition.

prompts.name: Old Photographs
prompts.text: Add old photographs as props or background detail, creating nostalgia and mystery.

prompts.name: Occult Symbols
prompts.text: Add subtle occult-style symbols as environmental detail with restrained gothic fantasy atmosphere.
